description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sofa with a minimalist design, featuring a two-tone color scheme of light gray cushions and a muted blue frame. The seat and backrest are divided into two equal sections, each with subtle horizontal channel tufting that adds texture and visual interest. The armrests are broad, straight, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a boxy silhouette. The sofa sits on four short, cylindrical legs that are only slightly visible, giving it a low-profile appearance. The upholstery appears to be a soft, woven fabric, while the frame is likely constructed from wood or engineered wood for stability. The overall look is clean, contemporary, and suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy sofa with light gray tufted cushions and a muted blue frame, featuring broad straight armrests and a low-profile design. The upholstery is soft and textured, with a clean, contemporary aesthetic.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, divided seat and back cushions, and broad straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick armrest, the depth of the seat, and the profile of the backrest and cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous blue back panel and the top edge of the segmented backrest.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, showing the armrest and the side profile of the seat and backrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, attached seat cushions and two matching back cushions, all uniform in size and featuring horizontal channel tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, straight armrests at seat and backrest height, with a boxy profile and no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs, likely made of dark wood or metal, positioned near the corners and slightly recessed.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, and segmented backrest with two equal sections, each featuring horizontal channel tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a subtle, quilted texture and horizontal channel tufting on both seat and back cushions.
